title: TerminalCommand
description: Operation contract for a single terminal command executed within a TerminalSession. Every TerminalCommand is associated with a WorkspaceOperation task and must produce evidence. Commands must not create hidden workspace side effects: all filesystem writes, network calls, and subprocess spawns that affect operation state must be declared in sideEffects.

operationId.description: WorkspaceOperation this command is part of.

taskId.description: OperationTask this command is assigned to.

args.description: Command arguments. Secrets must not appear here; pass via environment or FDs.

env.description: Environment variable overrides. Secret values must be referenced by name, not inlined.

cwd.description: Working directory override. Must be within an allowed filesystem root.

sideEffects.description: Declared side effects of this command. Hidden side effects are a conformance violation.

classification.description: Side effect category. 'none' means the command is read-only and produces no persistent changes.

filesWritten.description: Paths written or created. Must be within allowed filesystem roots.

networkTargets.description: Hosts or URLs contacted. Empty implies no network calls.

subprocesses.description: Child process names spawned by this command.

evidenceRef.description: Reference to the terminal.command.evidence artifact for this command.
